info.name: Bluesky Find posts matching search criteria, returning views of those posts.

params.name: q
params.description: Search query string; syntax, phrase, boolean, and faceting is unspecified, but Lucene query syntax is recommended.

params.name: sort
params.description: Specifies the ranking order of results.

params.name: since
params.description: Filter results for posts after the indicated datetime (inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: until
params.description: Filter results for posts before the indicated datetime (not inclusive). Expected to use 'sortAt' timestamp, which may not match 'createdAt'. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYY-MM-DD).

params.name: mentions
params.description: Filter to posts which mention the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time. Only matches rich-text facet mentions.

params.name: author
params.description: Filter to posts by the given account. Handles are resolved to DID before query-time.

params.name: lang
params.description: Filter to posts in the given language. Expected to be based on post language field, though server may override language detection.

params.name: domain
params.description: Filter to posts with URLs (facet links or embeds) linking to the given domain (hostname). Server may apply hostname normalization.

params.name: url
params.description: Filter to posts with links (facet links or embeds) pointing to this URL. Server may apply URL normalization or fuzzy matching.

params.name: tag
params.description: Filter to posts with the given tag (hashtag), based on rich-text facet or tag field. Do not include the hash (#) prefix. Multiple tags can be specified, with 'AND' matching.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Optional pagination mechanism; may not necessarily allow scrolling through entire result set.

info.name: Bluesky List moderation events related to a subject.

params.name: types
params.description: The types of events (fully qualified string in the format of tools.ozone.moderation.defs#modEvent<name>) to filter by. If not specified, all events are returned.

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Sort direction for the events. Defaults to descending order of created at timestamp.

params.name: createdAfter
params.description: Retrieve events created after a given timestamp

params.name: createdBefore
params.description: Retrieve events created before a given timestamp

params.name: collections
params.description: If specified, only events where the subject belongs to the given collections will be returned. When subjectType is set to 'account', this will be ignored.

params.name: subjectType
params.description: If specified, only events where the subject is of the given type (account or record) will be returned. When this is set to 'account' the 'collections' parameter will be ignored. When includeAllUserRecords or subject is set, this will be ignored.

params.name: includeAllUserRecords
params.description: If true, events on all record types (posts, lists, profile etc.) or records from given 'collections' param, owned by the did are returned.

params.name: hasComment
params.description: If true, only events with comments are returned

params.name: comment
params.description: If specified, only events with comments containing the keyword are returned

params.name: addedLabels
params.description: If specified, only events where all of these labels were added are returned

params.name: removedLabels
params.description: If specified, only events where all of these labels were removed are returned

params.name: addedTags
params.description: If specified, only events where all of these tags were added are returned

params.name: removedTags
params.description: If specified, only events where all of these tags were removed are returned

info.name: Bluesky View moderation statuses of subjects (record or repo).

params.name: includeAllUserRecords
params.description: All subjects, or subjects from given 'collections' param, belonging to the account specified in the 'subject' param will be returned.

params.name: subject
params.description: The subject to get the status for.

params.name: comment
params.description: Search subjects by keyword from comments

params.name: reportedAfter
params.description: Search subjects reported after a given timestamp

params.name: reportedBefore
params.description: Search subjects reported before a given timestamp

params.name: reviewedAfter
params.description: Search subjects reviewed after a given timestamp

params.name: hostingDeletedAfter
params.description: Search subjects where the associated record/account was deleted after a given timestamp

params.name: hostingDeletedBefore
params.description: Search subjects where the associated record/account was deleted before a given timestamp

params.name: hostingUpdatedAfter
params.description: Search subjects where the associated record/account was updated after a given timestamp

params.name: hostingUpdatedBefore
params.description: Search subjects where the associated record/account was updated before a given timestamp

params.name: hostingStatuses
params.description: Search subjects by the status of the associated record/account

params.name: reviewedBefore
params.description: Search subjects reviewed before a given timestamp

params.name: includeMuted
params.description: By default, we don't include muted subjects in the results. Set this to true to include them.

params.name: onlyMuted
params.description: When set to true, only muted subjects and reporters will be returned.

params.name: reviewState
params.description: Specify when fetching subjects in a certain state

params.name: lastReviewedBy
params.description: Get all subject statuses that were reviewed by a specific moderator

params.name: takendown
params.description: Get subjects that were taken down

params.name: appealed
params.description: Get subjects in unresolved appealed status

params.name: collections
params.description: If specified, subjects belonging to the given collections will be returned. When subjectType is set to 'account', this will be ignored.

params.name: subjectType
params.description: If specified, subjects of the given type (account or record) will be returned. When this is set to 'account' the 'collections' parameter will be ignored. When includeAllUserRecords or subject is set, this will be ignored.
